text:
Christian Weisgerber <naddy@mips.inka.de> writes:

> On systems with insufficient locale support this code dereferences a
> NULL pointer.

What do you mean by "insufficient locale support"?

> The patchlet below should fix this.

I've forwarded your message to <bug-tar@gnu.org>, thanks.
